Press & Media Kit

Every Solana bot in one.
And a stack no one else ships.

SlimeWire is the all-in-one Solana toolkit — a trading terminal, a Telegram trading bot, and a full group-bot suite (buy bot, scan bot, raid bot, moderation, and more) sharing one wallet. Everything the trenches need, in one place.

@SlimeWiredBot slimewire.org

The big idea: stop running five bots

Every memecoin project juggles a handful of bots — a buy bot in the group, a scan bot for contracts, a raid bot for X, a moderation bot to keep order, and a separate bot to actually trade. SlimeWire is all of them at once, wired to the same wallet and the same web terminal — plus launchpad, copy trading, community snipes, and live radars that most tools don't have at all. One bot to add. One wallet. The entire trench stack.

Everything inside SlimeWire

Four suites, one bot. Free to start — no sign-up, no seed phrase.

For traders

⚡ Trading terminal

  • One-click buy & sell — presets from your own wallet, in Telegram or web.
  • Copy trading — mirror any wallet's buys automatically, with auto TP/SL.
  • Limit orders, TP/SL & DCA — market-cap-triggered, fires on its own.
  • Bundle buys — the same action across many wallets at once.
  • SlimeShield scanner — instant rug read on any CA or $ticker.
For groups & communities

🤝 The all-in-one group bot

  • 🟢 Buy Bot — posts every buy with a one-tap Quick-Buy.
  • 🔍 Scan Bot — paste a CA/$ticker → instant SlimeShield card.
  • ⚔️ Raid Bot — X raids with live progress and rewards.
  • 🛡️ Rose & Shield — captcha, anti-scam, anti-impersonator, welcome, antiflood, karma.
  • 🎟️ Referral contests — SOL/coin-reward contests per group.
For devs & launches

🚀 Launch & grow

  • Launchpad — launch on pump.fun or SlimeWire and keep the creator fees.
  • 📈 Volume Bot — rolling ghost-wallet pool, pads your holder count.
  • 🎯 Community Snipe — the room co-enters your launch from their own wallets.
  • 🏆 Launch Room — one dev war room: launch + snipe + raid + momentum.
  • Anti-snipe bundle — Jito co-entry so bots don't front-run your buyers.
Intelligence & signals

🧠 Radars nobody else has

  • 🌀 Narrative Radar — the hot meta, mapped to the coins running it.
  • 🎓 Graduation Gauntlet — coins about to bond, surfaced early.
  • 🕵️ Alpha Radar — runners a real wallet network is quietly backing.
  • 🏆 The Room — verifiable on-chain PnL board + skin-in-the-game callers.
  • 📡 Exit Radar + AI Read — take-profit pings and an honest read on any coin.

Fast facts

Name
SlimeWire
What it is
All-in-one Solana terminal + Telegram bot
Platforms
Telegram · Web · installable app
Chain
Solana
Wallet
Free, no seed phrase, keys exportable
Pricing
Free to start · small per-trade fee
Telegram
@SlimeWiredBot
Website
slimewire.org

Boilerplate (copy-paste)

Use any length. All accurate, all yours to publish.

One-liner

SlimeWire — the all-in-one Solana memecoin terminal and Telegram trading bot.

Short

SlimeWire is an all-in-one Solana toolkit: buy, sell, copy-trade, run a volume bot, scan for rugs, set take-profit / stop-loss, and launch coins — from Telegram or the web, on one free wallet.

Long

SlimeWire is the all-in-one Solana toolkit. It combines a full trading terminal, a Telegram trading bot, and a complete group-bot suite — a buy bot, a scan/rug-check bot, an X raid bot, and Rose-style moderation — with copy trading, a volume bot, market-cap limit orders and TP/SL, a launchpad, community snipes, and live radars (narrative, graduation, alpha, exit). Everything shares one free wallet and works in Telegram and the web terminal, with no sign-up and no seed phrase. It replaces the five separate bots most projects run — and adds tools no single competitor ships.
